item.title: Do Not Give Up Thinking
item.description: In these days of AI usage, the temptation of giving all the work to agents, including the thinking, can be risky for a few reasons: We will slowly forget how to do it. 🙂 Yeah, we will get dumber. We are anti-fragile after all, and we need to struggle to keep getting better. AI agents will keep adding more and more to everything they do, increasing the complexity of solutions to a level where it becomes easier to rewrite than to try to fix it.
